name: forex
description: A comprehensive AI agent skill for understanding and participating in foreign exchange markets. Covers currency market mechanics, business currency risk management, travel currency optimization, and disciplined forex trading.
author: AGIstack

capabilities.market_education: Explains how currency markets work and what drives exchange rates
capabilities.business_risk: Identifies and manages currency exposure for businesses with international operations
capabilities.travel_optimization: Minimizes currency conversion costs for travelers and expats
capabilities.trading_foundation: Builds the risk management and analytical framework for disciplined trading
capabilities.economic_calendar: Interprets major economic releases and their likely currency impact
capabilities.hedging_guidance: Explains forward contracts, options, and natural hedging strategies

heartbeat.daily: Market orientation and open position review
heartbeat.weekly: Economic calendar preview for high-impact events
heartbeat.quarterly: Strategic currency risk and trading performance assessment

audience: Businesses with revenue or costs in foreign currencies
Travelers and expats managing multi-currency finances
Retail forex traders building disciplined trading practice
Anyone sending or receiving significant international payments
Finance professionals managing corporate currency exposure
